<!-- A clear description of what is wrong or inaccurate -->

## Where it appears
<!-- Which skill or reference doc? e.g., "openclaw-memory/SKILL.md", "references/gateway-config.md" -->

## Expected behavior
<!-- What should ClawDoc know or do instead? -->

## Actual behavior
<!-- What does ClawDoc do or say incorrectly? -->

## OpenClaw version
<!-- Run `openclaw --version` to check -->

## Additional context
<!-- Add any other relevant info, config snippets (redact secrets), or screenshots -->

## Suggested fix
<!-- Optional: how you think this should be fixed (not required) -->
